The Maharashtra Resilience Development Programme (MRDP) is a World Bank-assisted flood disaster management programme for the Krishna-Bhima basin in Kolhapur and Sangli districts of Kolhapur, Sangli, Miraj, Kupwara and Ichalkaranji.
